privileged_info_summary: The environment runs a local OrangeHRM 5.8 instance seeded with synthetic employee data. The target employee for this task is James Anderson (Employee ID: EMP001). The task objective is to update his work telephone to '646-555-9900'. It is verified from the environment setup scripts (setup_orangehrm.sh and setup_task.sh) that his initial work telephone is explicitly set to '212-555-0101' in the 'hs_hr_employee' database table prior to the task, and the browser is pre-navigated to his Contact Details page. The data source is entirely synthetic, injected via SQL seed scripts during environment initialization.
